views.name: Class Trait Value

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
introduced_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示加性遗传贡献的模型组成部分。

introduced_concepts.name: E
introduced_concepts.definition: They did so by modeling E using an exponential model (17.3a) Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: E 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 17.3a Distance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 17.3a Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 17.3a Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 17.3a Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how quickly a process occurs.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述某个过程发生快慢的参数。

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 遗传或传递之后观察到的平均性状值变化。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Probability
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how likely an event or state transition is.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量某个事件或状态转移发生可能性的数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: Keeping only first-order terms in and yields (17.10a) Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 是这条公式里的辅助符号，读公式时先看它和左侧核心量之间的关系。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Imath-bar
introduced_concepts.definition: Keeping only first-order terms in and yields (17.10a) Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Imath-bar 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Formula 17.5c Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
introduced_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示加性遗传贡献的模型组成部分。

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

introduced_concepts.name: Z-bar_i
introduced_concepts.definition: Natural selection can also act in a repeated-r Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Z-bar_i 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 17.11 Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

prerequisite_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
